versions.version_description: Better chord fluidity and intro is improved.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: It's just capo on 3 and Em C B7 the whole way through.

content:
Ellie Goulding - Love Me Like You Do
Chords by Jodi Apriadi (jodi_an@outlook.com)

[Intro]
[ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]
You're the light, you're the night[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]
You're the color of my blood[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Am[/ch]
You're the cure, you're the pain[/tab]
[tab]                                    [ch]F[/ch]
You're the only thing I wanna touch[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]                            [ch]Am[/ch]
Never knew that it could mean so much, so much[/tab]

[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]
You're the fear, I don't care[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]
'Cause I've never been so high[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]
Follow me to the dark[/tab]
[tab]                                    [ch]F[/ch]
Let me take you past our satellites[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]                             [ch]Am[/ch]
You can see the world you brought to life, to life[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]
So love me like you do, l-l-love me like you do[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                      [ch]F[/ch]
Love me like you do, l-l-love me like you do[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]G[/ch]
Touch me like you do, t-t-touch me like you do[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                [ch]F[/ch]
......What are you waiting for?[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]
Fading in, fading out[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]
On the edge of paradise[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Am[/ch]
Every inch of your skin[/tab]
[tab]                                 [ch]F[/ch]
is a holy grail I've got to find[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]                          [ch]Am[/ch]
Only you can set my heart on fire, on fire[/tab]

[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]
Yeah, I'll let you set the pace[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]
'Cause I'm not thinking straight[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]F[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]Am[/ch]
My head spinning around I can't see clear no more[/tab]

What are you waiting for?

[Chorus]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]
So love me like you do, l-l-love me like you do[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                      [ch]F[/ch]
Love me like you do, l-l-love me like you do[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]G[/ch]
Touch me like you do, t-t-touch me like you do[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                [ch]F[/ch]
......What are you waiting for?[/tab]

[tab] [ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]
So love me like you do, l-l-love me like you do[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                      [ch]F[/ch]
Love me like you do, l-l-love me like you do[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]G[/ch]
Touch me like you do, t-t-touch me like you do[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                [ch]F[/ch]
......What are you waiting for?[/tab]

[ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]

[Verse 3]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]
Yeah, I'll let you set the pace[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]
'Cause I'm not thinking straight[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]F[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]Am[/ch]
My head spinning around I can't see clear no more[/tab]

What are you waiting for?

[Chorus]
[tab] [ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]
So love me like you do, l-l-love me like you do[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                      [ch]F[/ch]
Love me like you do, l-l-love me like you do[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]G[/ch]
Touch me like you do, t-t-touch me like you do[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                [ch]F[/ch]
......What are you waiting for?[/tab]

[tab] [ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]
So love me like you do, l-l-love me like you do[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                      [ch]F[/ch]
Love me like you do, l-l-love me like you do[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]G[/ch]
Touch me like you do, t-t-touch me like you do[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                [ch]F[/ch]
......What are you waiting for?[/tab]

[Outro]

[ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
